name: captive-portal-dev
description: Dev workspace — runs all three services with one command

scripts.install:all: npm --prefix backend install && npm --prefix frontend install && npm --prefix admin install
scripts.dev: concurrently --names "API,PORTAL,ADMIN" --prefix-colors "green,cyan,magenta" "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:portal" "npm run dev:admin"
scripts.setup: npm run install:all && npm run migrate && echo '\n✅  Dev setup complete. Run: npm run dev'
